name: bigram_hash
why: 4096-bucket hashed token-pair lookup table (dim=128, projected to model_dim). Adds ~524K params of explicit bigram memory the model cannot learn in 10 minutes.
validates: Better val_bpb at matched wallclock from explicit bigram features alone.
falsifies: The extra ~524K parameters hurt quantization more than the bigram features help.
notes: Weights init to zeros, so starts as a no-op and learns during training.
Watch artifact size: ~524K extra params should still fit in 16MB with int8+zlib.
Separated from SmearGate to get clean attribution.
